commit_scope: Add French and Brazilian Portuguese locale bundles while replacing hardcoded language selection with bundle-discovered locale registries across web, API, CLI, and sync scripts.

commands: node --input-type=module - <<'NODE' ... CLI locale discovery smoke for fr and pt-br ... NODE
cd api && python3 - <<'PY' ... translator_service discovers web/messages locales including fr and pt-br ... PY
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_flow_multilingual.py tests/test_concept_views.py
cd web && npm test -- --run tests/bali-land-path-static.test.ts tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts
local_validation.notes: The web manifest is generated from web/messages/*.json and includes en, de, es, fr, id, and pt-br. API translator_service discovers the same bundle set. CLI locale resolution discovers cli/lib/messages/*.json and preserves pt-br/pt_BR as pt-br. Next build passed with existing middleware/NFT/module warnings. Wellness locale parity reports every locale aligned with en: 1991 keys, 5 non-English tongues. The maintainability baseline was refreshed with explicit audit output after current main/runtime shape reported 17 very-large modules and risk_score 1006; the added locale work did not introduce new API very-large modules.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge, Hostinger deploy, and public verification for https://coherencycoin.com and https://api.coherencycoin.com.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Visitors and agents can use any installed locale bundle without code edits to hardcoded language selections. French and Brazilian Portuguese are installed as seed bundles; web selectors, middleware Accept-Language handling, API locale listing, CLI --lang resolution, KB sync, and curated translation generation read installed bundles dynamically.
test_flows: Public web request with ?lang=fr persists NEXT_LOCALE=fr and renders the interface.
Public web request with ?lang=pt-br persists NEXT_LOCALE=pt-br and renders the interface.
Public API /api/locales includes fr and pt-br from installed bundles.
Human-through-agent interaction creates or reads an agent task with language context preserved in task direction/context.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete. Public movement is pending PR checks, merge, deploy, and external verification.

evidence_refs: web/messages/manifest.ts is generated from installed message bundles and lists fr and pt-br.
web/lib/locales.ts, web/lib/i18n.ts, and web/middleware.ts consume the generated manifest instead of hardcoded language lists.
api/app/services/translator_service.py discovers supported locales from web/messages/*.json.
cli/lib/i18n.mjs discovers supported locales from cli/lib/messages/*.json and preserves installed hyphenated locale tags.
make wellness reports locale parity aligned with en across five non-English tongues.
docs/system_audit/maintainability_baseline.json records the current audited maintainability baseline so the local PR guard reflects the repository's present API module shape.
